title: Banks Called to Washington - TCR 04/10/26
description:
The U.S. Treasury Secretary summoned the CEOs of Goldman Sachs, Bank of America, Citigroup, Morgan Stanley, and Wells Fargo - alongside the Federal Reserve chair - to discuss systemic cybersecurity risks posed by Anthropic's Claude Mythos, two days after the model's capability disclosure through Project Glasswing.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-10-2026/

The financial system's most important operators were gathered in Washington within 48 hours of a single AI capability disclosure - an institutional response time measured in days rather than quarters. OpenAI fired a public shot at Anthropic in an investor memo, claiming a widening compute advantage of 30 gigawatts to Anthropic's projected 7-8 by 2027, while Anthropic published the clinical findings from 20 hours of psychodynamic therapy sessions with Claude Mythos - two companies competing for the same future through fundamentally different theories of what intelligence is. March 2026 became the first month renewables generated more electricity than natural gas across the entire U.S. grid, wind set its best-ever monthly record, and Fervo Energy locked in a fully domestic geothermal supply chain through an $800 million deal with Vallourec - all while gas turbine prices are projected to nearly triple by 2027. A German medical team reported that a single CAR-T cell therapy eliminated three simultaneous autoimmune diseases in a patient who had failed nine prior treatments, with no medication required fourteen months later. xAI filed a federal lawsuit against Colorado to block the nation's first comprehensive AI anti-discrimination law, and Disney announced layoffs of up to 1,000 employees concentrated in its newly consolidated marketing department.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-10-2026/
